facebook.caption: With a 4.9/5 rating across more than 28,000 reviews, Wyndham Grand Phu Quoc is hard to argue with. Sitting right on Bãi Dài, one of the island's longest and least crowded stretches of sand, this resort offers 1,399 rooms and suites, multiple dining and bar options, and its own water park, making it a genuine all-in-one destination rather than just a place to sleep. Whether you're traveling with kids, as a couple, or in a group, the sheer scale means there's always something to do without ever leaving the property. Practical tip: book your room category carefully, as garden-view and sea-view rooms can differ quite a bit in price and experience. The dry season from November to April is the sweet spot for making the most of that beachfront setting.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the water park slides, the stretch of Bãi Dài outside your balcony, and the sun dropping into the Gulf of Thailand from the bar. Wyndham Grand Phu Quoc gives you a lot to look at, and a lot to do, all in one place. Over 28,000 guests gave it a 4.9 out of 5, and the footage makes it easy to see why.

instagram.caption: 1,399 rooms, a private stretch of Bãi Dài, a water park, and a 4.9/5 from over 28,000 guests. Wyndham Grand Phu Quoc is the kind of resort where you check in and genuinely never need to leave. Tip: visit November to April for the best beach weather.
instagram.video_caption: Slides, sunsets, and soft sand on Bãi Dài. Wyndham Grand Phu Quoc packs a water park, top-rated dining, and 1,399 rooms into one seriously impressive beachfront property.

tiktok.caption: A 4.9-star beach resort on Bãi Dài with its own water park. Wyndham Grand Phu Quoc might just be the easiest yes in Vietnam. #WyndhamGrandPhuQuoc #PhuQuocResort #VietnamTravel #BeachResort
